allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'email' in k.lower\(\) or 'signup' in k.lower\(\) or 'mailer' in k.lower\(\) or 'sms' in k.lower\(\) or 'phone' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('external_email_enabled:', d.get\('external_email_enabled'\)\); print\('mailer_autoconfirm:', d.get\('mailer_autoconfirm'\)\); print\('disable_signup:', d.get\('disable_signup'\)\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"query":"{Page\(perPage:5\){media\(search:\\"Death\\"\){id title{romaji english}}}}"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://graphql.anilist.co" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $r.data.Page.media | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($body = '{"query":"{__type\(name:\\"Page\\"\){fields{name args{name type{name}}}}}"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://graphql.anilist.co" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; \($r.data.__type.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "media" }\).args | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Select-String -Pattern "search" -Context 1)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('external_google_enabled:', d.get\('external_google_enabled'\)\); print\('external_google_client_id:', d.get\('external_google_client_id'\)\); print\('external_google_secret set:', bool\(d.get\('external_google_secret'\)\)\); print\('site_url:', d.get\('site_url'\)\); print\('uri_allow_list:', d.get\('uri_allow_list'\)\)")
